prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/text-to-video: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.3034/second** and for 1080p you will be charged **$0.682/second**. Your request will cost $0.014 per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/text-to-vide: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.2419/second**. Your request will cost **$0.0112** per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/image-to-video: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.3034/second** and for 1080p you will be charged **$0.682/second**. Your request will cost $0.014 per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/image-to-vid: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.2419/second**. Your request will cost **$0.0112** per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-vide: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.3034/second** and for 1080p you will be charged **$0.682/second**. Your request will cost $0.014 per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * (input video duration + output video duration) * 24) / 1024.  **If video inputs are provided the price is multiplied by 0.6**. With video inputs and 720p resolution the price is **$0.1814** per second.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/reference-to: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.2419/second**. Your request will cost **$0.0112** per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * (input video duration + output video duration) * 24) / 1024. **If video inputs are provided the price is multiplied by 0.6**. With video inputs and 720p resolution the price is **$0.14515** per second.
prices.fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1.5/pro/text-: Each 720p 5 second video with audio costs roughly **$0.26**. For other resolutions, 1 million video tokens with audio costs **$2.4**. Without audio, the price is **1.2** per millition tokens. tokens(video)  = (height x width x FPS x duration) / 1024.
prices.fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1.5/pro/image: Each 720p 5 second video with audio costs roughly **$0.26**. For other resolutions, 1 million video tokens with audio costs **$2.4**. Without audio, the price is **1.2** per millition tokens. tokens(video)  = (height x width x FPS x duration) / 1024.

prices.fal-ai/wan/v2.7/text-to-video: Your request will cost **$0.1** per second for 720p resolution. For 1080p your request will cost **$0.15** per second.
prices.fal-ai/wan/v2.7/image-to-video: Your request will cost **$0.1** per second for 720p resolution. For 1080p your request will cost **$0.15** per second.

prices.xai/grok-imagine-video/text-to-video: For 6s 480p video your request will cost **$0.3**. At an output resolution of 480p, every second costs **$0.05**, and at 720p, every second costs **$0.07**.
prices.xai/grok-imagine-video/image-to-video: A 6s 480p video will cost **$0.302** (**$0.05** per second of 480p video + **$0.002** for image input). At an output resolution of 480p, every second costs **$0.05**, and at 720p, every second costs **$0.07**.
prices.xai/grok-imagine-video/v1.5/image-to-vid: Priced per second of output video, by resolution: **480p** at **$0.08**/sec, **720p** at **$0.14**/sec. A 5-second 480p clip costs **$0.40**; 720p costs **$0.70**. Cost scales linearly with duration. Each input image adds **$0.01**. Audio, if generated, is included.
prices.xai/grok-imagine-video/reference-to-vide: A **6s** **480p** video will cost **$0.302** (**$0.05** per second of **480p** video + **$0.002** for image input). At an output resolution of **480p**, every second costs **$0.05**, and at **720p**, every second costs **$0.07**.
prices.xai/grok-imagine-video/edit-video: For a 6s 480p video your request will cost **$0.36** (**$0.05** per second of video output + **$0.01** per second of video input). At an output resolution of 480p, every second costs **$0.06** (**$0.05** for output and **$0.01** for input), and at 720p, every second costs **$0.08** (**$0.07** for output and **$0.01** for input)

prices.openai/gpt-image-2:
Text tokens (per 1M): **$5.00** input, **$1.25** cached, **$10.00** output.
Image tokens (per 1M): **$8.00** input, **$2.00** cached, **$30.00** output. Changing the **quality** parameter significantly affects cost; by default we use **high**. Adjust it to your preference.
See the description at the bottom of this page for more details on how much canonical image sizes cost. Total cost is rounded up to the closest hundredth of a cent ($0.0001.)
prices.openai/gpt-image-2/edit:
Text tokens (per 1M): **$5.00** input, **$1.25** cached, **$10.00** output.
Image tokens (per 1M): **$8.00** input, **$2.00** cached, **$30.00** output. Changing the **quality** parameter significantly affects cost; by default we use **high**. Adjust it to your preference.
See the description at the bottom of this page for more details on how much canonical image sizes cost. Total cost is rounded up to the closest hundredth of a cent ($0.0001).
prices.fal-ai/gpt-image-1.5:
Your request will cost different amounts based on the number of images, quality, and size.

- You will be charged $0.005 per 1,000 input text tokens. One word is roughly 4 tokens.
-  You will be charged $0.010 per 1,000 output text tokens. The model will consume tokens reasoning about your prompt based on it's complexity.
- For **low** quality, you will be charged $0.009 for 1024x1024 or $0.013 for any other size *per image*.
- For **medium** quality, you will be charged $0.034 for 1024x1024, $0.051 for 1024x1536 and $0.050 for 1536x1024 *per image*.
- For **high** quality, you will be charged $0.133 for 1024x1024, $0.200 for 1024x1536 or $0.199 for 1536x1024 *per image*.
prices.fal-ai/gpt-image-1.5/edit:
Your request will cost different amounts based on the number of images, quality, and size.

- You will be charged $0.005 per 1,000 input text tokens. One word is roughly 4 tokens.
- You will be charged $0.008 per 1,000 input image tokens. One 1024x1024 image is roughly 135 tokens in low fidelity mode, or 3,050 tokens in high fidelity mode.
-  You will be charged $0.010 per 1,000 output text tokens. The model will consume tokens reasoning about your prompt based on it's complexity.
- For **low** quality, you will be charged $0.009 for 1024x1024 or $0.013 for any other size *per image*.
- For **medium** quality, you will be charged $0.034 for 1024x1024, $0.051 for 1024x1536 and $0.050 for 1536x1024 *per image*.
- For **high** quality, you will be charged $0.133 for 1024x1024, $0.200 for 1024x1536 or $0.199 for 1536x1024 *per image*.

If web search is used, an additional $0.015 will be charged. **Note: Pricing is subject to change.**

If web search is used, an additional $0.015 will be charged. **Note: Pricing is subject to change.**
prices.fal-ai/gemini-3-pro-image-preview: Your request will cost **$0.15** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **7** times. 4K outputs will be charged at double the standard rate. Note: Pricing may change in the future.
prices.fal-ai/gemini-3-pro-image-preview/edit: Your request will cost **$0.15** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **7** times. 4K outputs will be charged at double the standard rate. Note: Pricing may change in the future.

prices.ideogram/v4/image-to-image: Your request will cost **$0.0075** per megapixel in **TURBO** mode, **$0.015** per megapixel in **BALANCED** mode, or **$0.025** per megapixel in **QUALITY** mode. For example, a 2048 x 2048 image will cost **$0.03**, **$0.06** or **$0.10** based on the mode.

prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/mini/text-to-vide:
For every second of video generated, you will be charged roughly **$0.0721/second** for 480p and **$0.1547/second** for 720p.
Actual cost calculations are based on token prices, with token costs being **$0.007** per 1000 tokens for both 480p and 720p. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/mini/image-to-vid:
For every second of video generated, you will be charged roughly **$0.0721**/second for **480p** and **$0.1547**/second for **720p**.
Actual cost calculations are based on token prices, with token costs being **$0.007** per **1,000** tokens for both **480p** and **720p**. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.
prices.bytedance/seedance-2.0/mini/reference-to:
For every second of video generated, you will be charged roughly **$0.0721/second** for **480p** and **$0.1547/second** for **720p**.
If a video input is provided, the video input is charged at **0.6** times the per-second price for the selected resolution. This is roughly **$0.0433/second** for 480p video and **$0.0928/second** for 720p video. **You will be charged for video input and output, at the rate for the output resolution.**
Actual cost calculations are based on token prices, with token costs being **$0.007** per 1,000 tokens for both 480p and 720p. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * (input video duration + output video duration) * 24) / 1024.

prices.google/nano-banana-2-lite: Text tokens (per 1M): $0.3125 input, $1.875 output. Image tokens (per 1M): $0.3125 input, $37.50 output. Output images are generated at a fixed 1K (1024x1024px)
prices.bytedance/seedream/v5/pro/edit: You will be charged for both input and output images. The first input image is not charged, and every additional input image will cost **$0.0045**. Tentative pricing is **$0.0675+ $(0.0045 x number of additional input images)** per output image for images of total area less than or equal to **1536x1536** pixels. For output images with area in between **1536x1536** and **2048x2048** pixels, the price is **$0.135 + $(0.0045 x number of additional input images)** per image.
prices.bytedance/seedream/v5/pro/text-to-image: Tentative pricing is **$0.0675** per image for images of total area less than or equal to **1536x1536** pixels. For images with area in between **1536x1536** and **2048x2048** pixels, the price is **$0.135** per image.
